use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC HCV INFECTION WHO HAVE GENOTYPE 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, OR 6 INFECTION AND HAVE PREVIOUSLY BEEN TREATED WITH AN HCV REGIMEN CONTAINING AN NS5A INHIBITOR
TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS WITH CHRONIC HCV INFECTION WHO HAVE GENOTYPE 1A OR 3 INFECTION AND HAVE PREVIOUSLY BEEN TREATED WITH AN HCV REGIMEN CONTAINING SOFOSBUVIR WITHOUT AN NS5A INHIBITOR

indications.text:
VOSEVI is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with chronic hepatitis C virus
(HCV) infection without cirrhosis or with compensated cirrhosis (Child-Pugh A) who
have [see Dosage and Administration (2.2) and Clinical Studies (14)]:
• genotype 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, or 6 infection and have previously...
